arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on Son absence, Odobert fitness, Parrott, FA fine and high line
arts.sum: Whenever you play away in Europe like we did the last game, Ferencvaros, again a different challenge and we have exposed some of our younger players to European football which I think is a positive and you see growth from that. It is good to see Troy doing well, I think he had a great loan spell in the Dutch League last year.
